hero.title: Manage only this space and how it appears in public.
hero.description: This area no longer aggregates every user space. It stays focused on the current space, its sections, its events and its public presentation.

panels.spaceDescription: A quick snapshot of the space's current public identity and its core numbers.
panels.recentDescription: Recently updated events are gathered here for a fast review.

hero.title: Organize every section in this space here.
hero.description: Only the section details that actually need human input are managed here.

editor.title: Section editor
editor.description: Adjust the section name, description, category and visibility. Other system fields are handled automatically.
editor.draftHint: Changes stay in the current editing state until you decide to save them.

reorder.hint: Drag the handle on the right to adjust the display order. When you're done, click “Done reordering”.

hero.title: Only this space's events are listed here.
hero.description: Events are sorted by their latest update so status, visibility and owning section are easy to review.

hero.title: Manage this space's profile and publishing rules in one place.
hero.description: This area collects the current space's basic profile, visibility state and public entry route.

cards.visibilityDescription: This controls whether the space appears in the directory and whether visitors can discover it directly.
